title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 1. `P0` 可読性 floor が runtime で実質未強制です。`qc-post` の floor 値自体が低く（`20/14/13/10.5`）、しかも overflow 自動縮小の下限としてしか使っていません。初期フォントが floor 未満でも overflow しなければ通過します。 [qc-post-generation.js#L44](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L44) [qc-post-generation.js#L733](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L733) [qc-post-generation.js#L923](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L923) [agents/verify-quality.md#L72](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/verify-quality.md#L72) 2. `P0` gemini-only 経路で cover title wrap を非blocking化しており、薄い見た目でも PASS しやすいです。さらに adaptive fallback 側は常に `--allow-preqc-bypass` を付与しています。 [qc-post-generation.js#L719](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L719) [test-unit-qc-post-generation.js#L413](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-post-generation.js#L413) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L346](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L346) [test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L123](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L123) 3. `P1` take-home / 略語展開チェックが template-first 全体に広がっていません。`expected_takeaway` は source-linked slide に限定、略語未展開の検査は runtime に実装が見当たりません。 [qc-post-generation.js#L332](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L332) [qc-post-generation.js#L400](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L400) [qc-pre-generation.js#L188](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L188) [agents/agent.md#L158](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md#L158) 4. `P1` 装飾線（中央オレンジ線/separator）が default で描画される実装のままです。policy は「default で入れない」ですが renderer は常時追加しています。 [slides-template-renderers.js#L206](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L206) [slides-template-renderers.js#L573](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L573) [slides-template-renderers.js#L128](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L128) [agents/agent.md#L125](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md#L125) 5. `P2` brand/decorative 系QCは実装が弱く、`missing_brand_element` も `info` 扱い（non-blocking）で、実質 page number しか見ていません。 [qc-post-generation.js#L647](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L647) [qc-post-generation.js#L653](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L653) [qc-post-generation.js#L923](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L923) 6. `P2` 回帰テスト不足です。略語未展開 blocking、全slide take-home判定、decorative line default-off の unit がありません。 [test-unit-qc-post-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-post-generation.js) [test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js)
